factions.notes: The K34 garrison and its patrols. Standing falls on arrests/fines/house-arrests; the ONE behavior read this sprint shifts ApprehendPolicy's warn-vs-fine lenience.
The rooftop brotherhood and its street affiliates. Warms to whoever the Watch corrects — the mirror ledger of every justice event.
The mission clergy. Membership only this sprint: no event moves Temple standing yet (alms/witness deltas are future work).
Counter-keepers and traders. Standing rises with honest purchases (counter buys + household provisioning).
The laboring mass of the quays, farms, ships and pens. Membership only this sprint. Unlisted jobs (wastrel.streetlife, flame_of_merc, beast.*) are deliberately unaffiliated.

notes: Sprint-1 faction registry (sim team). Schema mirrors skills.json: top-level id + rows of {id, displayName, memberJobs}; notes are documentation-only. memberJobs reference jobs.json ids; a job may belong to at most one faction (loader-validated). Deterministic numeric ids are assigned by sorted key order: dockhands=0, merchants=1, skyrunners=2, temple=3, watch=4.
